title: phlox × oliverorum
intro: Phlox × oliverorum, also known as the fragrant phlox, is a hybrid plant species in the phlox genus, resulting from the cross-pollination of Phlox pilosa and Phlox subulata. The medicinal properties of Phlox × oliverorum lie in its high concentration of volatile oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phlox × oliverorum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
